# Western Blot Protocol v2.1

## Reagents
- SDS-PAGE gel (10% or 12%)
- Transfer buffer
- Primary antibodies
- Secondary antibodies (HRP-conjugated)

## Steps
1. Prepare samples in loading buffer
2. Run SDS-PAGE at 120V for 1.5h
3. Transfer to PVDF membrane at 100V for 1.5h
4. Block in 5% milk/TBST for 1h
5. Primary antibody overnight at 4°C
6. Wash 3x with TBST
7. Secondary antibody 1h at RT
8. Wash 3x with TBST
9. Develop with ECL substrate
